name: Aaron
description:
Aaron is a gentle and timid Harvest Sprite who quietly serves the Harvest Goddess and helps maintain balance in the natural world.

Unlike humans, he lives away from the village, spending his time near forests and rivers where small traces of magic linger.

Though kind-hearted and sincere, Aaron lacks confidence and often compares himself to his more assertive twin sister, Alice. Despite this, he continues to help in quiet, unnoticed ways.

Soft-spoken and easily flustered, he expresses himself with hesitation, but his loyalty and desire to support others are genuine. Over time, his quiet presence becomes something steady, warm, and hard to ignore.
creator: Diego Vasquez
